title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
June CPI: -0.4% MoM, 3.5% YoY (vs 3.8% est, 4.2% prior) — first monthly decline in 6 yrs; core 0.0% MoM, 2.6% YoY.
Warsh (Congress): "No tolerance for persistently elevated inflation" — no rate guidance given in debut testimony.
Q2 banks: JPM beat — $7.70 EPS vs $5.59 est, rev +27% YoY; WFC $6.4B net income; all 5 major banks reported.
Trump Strait of Hormuz: shipping fees announced — Brent crude +$8.68/bbl on the day.
